mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no statistical relationship with FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending power, which forces equity valuations lower over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 65% of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.3pp in 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day returns with out-of-sample accuracy below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, which triggers short-term equity price appreciation over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show negative or zero correlation with INDPRO momentum during early-cycle expansions.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above 235 indicate entrenched inflationary pressures that erode real corporate margins and force discount rate repricing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in > 60% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 235.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment confirms robust labor market tightening, which supports wage growth and consumer demand, yielding positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE fails to predict positive 60-day returns with statistical significance at p > 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real gross domestic product reflects underlying economic expansion that directly translates into higher corporate earnings expectations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show no predictive power for 5-day forward returns with Rank IC consistently near zero across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal a contraction in manufacturing output and supply chain bottlenecks, which triggers risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in > 55% of instances following two consecutive monthly INDPRO declines.
